title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at iGate India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at iGate India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at iGate India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About iGate India:
iGate India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India!
